productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kaniel White Yellow Infant Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: White round neck sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with yellow ribbing around neckline, yellow piping around the armholes  and graphic and appliques on the chestshorts: Plaid cargo shorts in yellow and black striped checks made of cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the sides, four patch pockets with flap openings with velcro closures - two on the sides and two on the back - and drawstring on the hemlines for easy adjustmentFittingTop: RegularShorts: Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bring out the small handyman side in your little boy in this white and yellow tee and plaid shorts combo from gini and jony. The doodle of the house on stilts and the pig, wolf and hedgehog appliques, all have a happy childhood vibe to it.  Team this with the super comfy plaid shorts and crocs for happy, casual outings, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
